title: LagMap
description: A real-time web lag heat-map to see exactly where the server is lagging.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be4f44d3c99527934be12295a90275c52ced2a80.png)

## **Warning**: This plugin is still in early beta, expect **bugs**!

**What does this plugin do?**

This plugin adds a /lagmap command to open a GUI where you can click the block of raw gold to generate a lag heat-map in the browser, just click the given link in chat, and it's that easy! You can easily spot who or what is lagging your server and get on to fix it! This is perfect for servers with not that many staff.

**Commands:** 

/lagmap - opens the main GUI to reload & load the lagmap.

**Config:**


```
# ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
# ║                  LagMap  config.yml                  ║
# ╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

# Completely disable the plugin.
# ⚠ NOTE: Requires a full server restart to take effect.
disabled: false

# How often (in seconds) the lag data is refreshed.
# ✔ This setting CAN be reloaded at runtime via the /lagmap menu
#   without restarting the server.
refresh-cooldown: 60

# TCP port the built-in heatmap web server listens on.
# ⚠ NOTE: Requires a full server restart to take effect.
web-port: 8085

# The publicly accessible base URL shown to operators when they
# click "Generate Heatmap" in the menu.
# Change this to your server's public IP or domain name.
# Example: http://203.0.113.10:8085
# ⚠ NOTE: Requires a full server restart to take effect.
web-url: "http://localhost:8085"
```

![Main GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/732797948baca94f55f884dec3dc62ee7d341781.png)

_report any bugs to: 2in6. on discord_
